violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The coving around the kitchen floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The Milk Case by the entry door to the kitchen was not operational. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Refrigerator door gasket on milk the milk cases were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. No temperature logs for receiving. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Chicken patties and grilled cheese sandwiches were observed held between 109-112 degrees Fahrenheit at the steam hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items arrived minutes before inspection. No equipment to reheated. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Ambient temperature of the refrigerator was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food items were moved to different refrigerator unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
There is insufficient hot holding equipment to maintain foods at 135 degrees F or above. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
Oven located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Oven MUST be replaced or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
